zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Thimbleby於1451年出生在英國林可爾史爾艾德林頓時，他的父親Thomas Robert Thimbleby27歲，母親Margaret Bilesby23歲。他於大約1476年與Elizabeth Hilton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年4月24日在英國林可爾史爾霍爾頓享年71歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾易爾納姆易爾納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Thimbleby于1451年出生在英国林可爾史爾艾德林頓时，他的父亲Thomas Robert Thimbleby27岁，母亲Margaret Bilesby23岁。他于大约1476年与Elizabeth Hilton在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年4月24日在英国林可爾史爾霍爾頓享年71岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾易爾納姆易爾納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Thimbleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name, primarily from Thimbleby (Lincs), but also from Thimbleby (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Thimbleby was born in 1451, in Edlington, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Robert Thimbleby, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Bilesby, was 23. He married Elizabeth Hilton about 1476, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 24 April 1522, in Holton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Thimbleby est né en 1451, à Edlington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Robert Thimbleby, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bilesby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hilton environ 1476, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1522, à Holton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Thimbleby 1451 in Edlington, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Robert Thimbleby 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Bilesby 23. Er hat um 1476 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 24. April 1522 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Holton, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Thimbleby è nato il nel 1451 nel Edlington, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Robert Thimbleby, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bilesby, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hilton circa 1476, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1522, nel Holton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Thimblebyが1451年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアエドリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Robert Thimblebyは27歳，母Margaret Bilesbyは23歳であった。約1476年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでElizabeth Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年4月24日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホルトンで71歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムイルンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Thimbleby(이)가 1451년 영국 링코실르 에들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Robert Thimbleby(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bilesby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Elizabeth Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 4월 24일 영국 링코실르 홀턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 언함 언함에 묻혔다.

mn.Irnham, Lincoln, England: Irnham, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Thimbleby nasceu em 1451, em Edlington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Robert Thimbleby, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bilesby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hilton aproximadamente 1476, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1522, em Holton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Thimbleby родился в 1451 г. в местности эдлингтон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Robert Thimbleby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bilesby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hilton около 1476 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 24 апреля 1522 г. в местности холтон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности ирнам, ирнам, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Thimbleby nació en 1451, en Edlington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Robert Thimbleby, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Bilesby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hilton aproximadamente 1476, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1522, en Holton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Irnham, Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
